title: demora legendary weapons
description: Legendary weapons for your battle Royal server.
body:
![H](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5dd0db40fe94bce2496e07fc2232de9d5676eeff_0.webp)
Recourse pack - https://discord.gg/CuMRdDj4tC  
You can download here. Each weapon's description is also available in our discord.

Plugin languages: Русский, English, Tiếng Việt, Deutsch

A plugin for legendary weapons. Each weapon is unique and has its own abilities. Some weapons complement each other. Additionally, some weapons can be awakened to gain new abilities. Currently, the following weapons are available for distribution:
- sculk_crossbow
- midas_sword
- mjolnir
- shadow_blade
- reaper_scythe
- villager_staff
- dragon_katana
- excalibur
- void_staff
- magma_club
- shrink_ray
- chainsaw_sword
- wither_sickles
- cloud_sword
- hypnosis_staff
- emerald_blade
- golem_hammer
- toxic_crossbow
- Lich_staff
- Artemis_bow
- Poseidon_trident
- Reinforced_elytra
- Ravager_horn

Commands:
/demorahop reload - reload config
/demorahop give <weapon> <nickname>
/dm - open all weapons menu
/dmr - open all rework weapons menu
/demorahop lang <language>
/dragonrework
/sicklesrework

Most large servers use this plugin for their events. Conduct the royal battles yourself!
